name: Basic Candy Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the water, sugar, corn syrup, and butter.
2. Cook over moderate heat until the mixture reaches 280°F on a candy thermometer.
3. Add the oil of peppermint and food coloring to the pan.
4. Stir well to combine.
5. Pour the mixture over the popped corn.
